# accept-md
> Serve Markdown from Next.js and SvelteKit via Accept: text/markdown

## Preferred access
All pages support: Accept: text/markdown
Example: curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://accept.md/docs/installation

## Key pages
- Docs: https://accept.md/docs
- Learn: https://accept.md/learn
- Output format: https://accept.md/docs/output
- Markdown audit: https://accept.md/markdown-audit
- GitHub: https://github.com/slick-enterprises/accept-md

## Sitemap
https://accept.md/sitemap.xml

## Crawler policy
AI crawlers (GPTBot, PerplexityBot, ClaudeBot, etc.) are allowed. See /robots.txt.
